knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Jerkbait rod is the most critical piece — shorter handle, longer rod, graphite with extra fast tip and sturdy backbone. Never pull the jerkbait toward the boat with the reel — work it with the rod, use reel only to pick up slack. Fast 7.5:1 gear ratio. Fluorocarbon is critical — 14lb is my favorite, still makes bait jump on long casts into wind. Below 12lb, too much stretch hurts action.'
